data.body: PASS-2 verification note: Finding index 4 confirmed against code — `_plan_review_precheck` (transition.py:724) runs `claim_gate_check` OUTSIDE the lock before `claim_core` (transition.py:732) acquires the write lock; the locked re-read in txn.py:364-369 only re-checks `actual_status != "open"` and does NOT re-run the signature/material gate, leaving a real check-then-act window on the signature vs. the plan AC's "ONE atomic operation ... no check-then-act gap". Finding 5: rationale exists in source comments at src/rebar/llm/plan_review/attest.py:1-17 (cited as bare "attest.py"); plan "Why" states only the requirement, not the positive mechanism rationale.
